A framework to estimate causal effects by integrating repeated Mendelian
Randomization (MR) information obtained from all exposure-outcome GWAS
database pairings. JointMR evaluates correlation structures among GWAS
databases, constructs pleiotropy-adjusted Wald ratios, estimates
instrumental variable heterogeneity, and implements a relaxed-NOME
extension to account for measurement errors.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`JointMR_analysis()`](JointMR_analysis.md) : Estimate the causal
  effect using JointMR
- [`sample_exposure`](sample_exposure.md) : Sample exposure GWAS
  datasets
- [`sample_N_list`](sample_N_list.md) : Sample sizes for the mock GWAS
  datasets
- [`sample_outcome`](sample_outcome.md) : Sample outcome GWAS datasets

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [JointMR: A joint likelihood-based approach for causal effect
  estimation using multiple GWAS summary databases in Mendelian
  randomization.](JointMR_tutorial.md):
